title: Inbound channels (Telegram · Slack · WhatsApp · Discord)
description: Inbound messaging surfaces: connect a bot per platform, DM/slash-command it, the bound agent replies using workspace creds — always back to the same surface. Webhook auth is the per-channel platform secret (Telegram secret_token · Slack v0 HMAC · WhatsApp X-Hub-Signature-256 · Discord Ed25519); every reply lands in callForUser. Telegram/Slack/WhatsApp ACK-fast then defer the model turn; Discord answers slash commands inline.
